title: prangos ledebourii
intro: Prangos ledebourii, also known as Ferula ledebourii or Persian silphion, is a plant species in the carrot family that grows in the mountainous regions of Iran. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is known for its health benefits, which include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Prangos ledebourii include extracts, essential oils, and dried roots, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and topical creams for medicinal purposes.
